abstract.t: The Static Context Header Compression (SCHC) framework identified the need for a minimal transport encapsulation that provides Session multiplexing when extrinsic Discriminators are insufficient. This document specifies a Link Multiplexer (VOICI) that addresses those SCHC-driven requirements while remaining general enough to accommodate other compression mechanisms and uncompressed payloads. The encapsulation is designed for minimal overhead, reducing to 2 bytes in the common case, while supporting optional integrity protection and original EtherType/port recovery.
